prospects.title: VP of Sales
prospects.recent_news: GrowthSaaS launched an AI-powered CRM add-on in March 2026 and closed a $4M seed round.
pain_points: Scaling outbound without increasing SDR headcount
SDR ramp time averaging 4 months
Manual prospect research consuming 60% of rep time
prospects.personalisation_hook: Saw that GrowthSaaS is hiring a Sales Ops Manager — usually a sign the team is hitting process limits at scale.

prospects.title: Chief Revenue Officer
prospects.recent_news: Loopify expanded into the Saudi Arabian market in April 2026 after strong UAE growth.
pain_points: Building a repeatable outbound process from scratch in a new market
No established brand recognition in Saudi Arabia
Lack of localised prospect data for KSA
prospects.personalisation_hook: Noticed Loopify just expanded into Saudi Arabia — new markets always make outbound 10x harder without the right data.

prospects.title: Head of Sales
prospects.recent_news: NexusCRM was featured in Forbes Middle East's Top 50 Startups list in February 2026.
pain_points: Small team competing against enterprise CRM vendors
Generating qualified enterprise leads with limited marketing budget
Long sales cycles (6-9 months) draining pipeline
prospects.personalisation_hook: Congrats on the Forbes Middle East feature — that kind of visibility usually brings inbound noise but not always the right outbound pipeline.

prospects.title: Director of Sales
prospects.recent_news: StackHive raised a Series A of $12M in January 2026, led by Gulf Capital.
pain_points: Rapidly scaling a sales team post Series A
Building enterprise sales motion for the first time
Inconsistent outreach quality across the SDR team
prospects.personalisation_hook: Saw StackHive closed a $12M Series A — scaling an enterprise sales team that fast is exciting but the outreach quality usually drops before it gets better.

prospects.title: VP Sales & Partnerships
pain_points: Growing partner channel without a dedicated team
Identifying the right reseller partners in the region
prospects.personalisation_hook: Noticed BrightDesk is hiring a Channel Partner Manager — building a partner channel from scratch is one of the trickiest outbound challenges out there.

prospects.title: Chief Sales Officer
prospects.recent_news: WaverPay received a UAE Central Bank digital payments license in March 2026.
pain_points: Educating enterprise prospects on a new payment category
Long compliance-related sales cycles in banking sector
Breaking into large enterprise accounts in GCC
prospects.personalisation_hook: Congrats on the Central Bank license — that's a huge milestone. Selling a new payment product into enterprise banks is a completely different outbound game.

prospects.title: Sales Manager
prospects.recent_news: PropTech ME launched a new AI property valuation tool in Q1 2026.
pain_points: Convincing traditional real estate agencies to adopt new tech
High churn in the first 90 days post-onboarding
Small brand recognition outside Dubai
prospects.personalisation_hook: Saw that PropTech ME launched an AI valuation tool — getting traditional real estate agencies to actually adopt it is where most proptech sales teams get stuck.

prospects.title: Head of Business Development
prospects.recent_news: EduFlow signed a contract with 3 Dubai government schools in April 2026.
pain_points: Breaking into private school sector after government wins
Long procurement cycles in educational institutions
Demonstrating ROI to non-technical school administrators
prospects.personalisation_hook: Saw the Dubai government school contract announcement — those wins are great for credibility but private schools have a completely different buying process.

prospects.title: VP Sales — MENA
prospects.recent_news: CloudBase was acquired by a US-based cloud infrastructure company in February 2026.
pain_points: Integrating two sales teams post-acquisition
Retaining enterprise accounts during ownership transition
Rebuilding pipeline after acquisition disruption
prospects.personalisation_hook: Noticed CloudBase was acquired in February — post-acquisition is one of the trickiest times to keep the sales pipeline moving.

prospects.title: Director of Sales
prospects.recent_news: ShipRocket ME expanded its logistics network to cover all 7 Emirates in March 2026.
pain_points: Converting SME trial users into paying enterprise accounts
Competing with Aramex and FedEx on enterprise deals
Building a direct sales motion alongside a marketplace model
prospects.personalisation_hook: Saw ShipRocket ME now covers all 7 Emirates — the next challenge is usually converting SME trial users into proper enterprise accounts.
